articles.headline: Towards Environmentally Sustainable Aviation: A Review on Operational Optimization
articles.blurb: Growing air traffic is straining airports and airspace while raising environmental concerns, and demand is only expected to increase. articles.takeaway: Optimizing airline, airport, and flight operations through advanced technologies is critical to accommodate growing air traffic while meeting environmental sustainability targets.
keywords: aviation; optimization; operations research; sustainability; environmental impacts
